    • Uses of LinearFeature in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.decoration

      class  PolylineFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing a polyline.

    • Uses of LinearFeature in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge that implement LinearFeature 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  EdgeFigure<E extends Edge<?,?,?,?>>
      Abstract Figure classe for representing edges between nodes' ports.
      class  PolylineEdgeFigure<E extends Edge<?,?,?,?>>
      Edge that is drawn with a polyline.
      class  SegmentEdgeFigure<E extends Edge<?,?,?,?>>
      Edge that is drawn with a single segment.
